exploration_notes: Implemented three new files in flink-streaming-java following existing Flink windowing patterns. TradingSessionExtractor is a @FunctionalInterface modeled after SessionWindowTimeGapExtractor for extracting market IDs. PricingSessionWindow extends MergingWindowAssigner<Object, TimeWindow> with a forMarket() factory method that configures market open/close times and timezone; assignWindows() computes session boundaries using java.time, handling both normal same-day sessions (NYSE 09:30-16:00) and
